flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sacred Heart University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.2k → $50.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sacred Heart University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.2k → $50.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Sacred Heart University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).
